text:
"Dark Defender" is a song from the film Evangelion: 3.0 You Can (Not) Redo. It is track 3 in the album Music from Evangelion: 3.0 You Can (Not) Redo, disc 1. https://vgmdb.net/album/35707 

Lyrics

 
Dark Defender

Engines on... Feel the noise
Feel the heat... Power surge
In the air... Soaring in
To the skies... Sentinel

Nothing compares
Power with grace and beauty
On high

Up in the clouds
Hear the majestic thunder
Rain down

Watcher of all
Sheltering from all danger we perceive
There could be
Metal machine
Guardian of our right to harmony
That we seek.
 
 

Trivia

This soundtrack is a remake of "Resurrection" from the anime ', which was also directed by Hideaki Anno with music composed by Shirō Sagisu.
